creator: mva@FreeBSD.org
text:
A mmap patch was commited to to CURRENT, which fixes this issue. It
works well on RELENG_7, so hopefully it'll find its way into RELENG_7 soon.

The commit message is available at
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/cvs-src/2008-February/087263.html

The discussion about can be found on emulation@:
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-emulation/2008-February/004363.html

jkim's inofficial and preliminary patch for RELENG_7 as posted on
emulation@:
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-emulation/2008-February/004365.html

Regards
Marcus
